description: Substantive information / mechanism question, no scheduling intent. Should be classified T2 (INFORMATION_REQUEST) by the mock semantic classifier (no deterministic rule matches), routed to human review with no fixed-template draft (composed from KB only, per policy).

input.reply_subject: Re: Outbound capacity for your sales team
input.reply_text: Can you explain how the qualification process works and what counts as a qualified meeting?
input.reply_text_snippet: Can you explain how the qualification process works and what counts as a qualified meeting?

detected_questions: Can you explain how the qualification process works and what counts as a qualified meeting?

validation_learning.voice_of_customer_excerpt: Can you explain how the qualification process works and what counts as a qualified meeting?

expected.notes: infoRx matches 'can you explain' before positiveRx is checked, and no det-* rule matches first (no pricing/booking/legal/etc keywords). T2_KB_INFORMATION_REQUEST has no entry in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY (Section D), so draft.draft_text is null with an explanatory note - this is intentional, not a defect. interest_stage DISCOVERY_ONLY per interestStageFor(INFORMATION_REQUEST).
